author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Introducing Escape Velocity!

Escape Velocity will be movement testing grounds for Star Atlas: Golden Era, real-time and on-chain, movement mechanics.

While testing, you'll be scanning for a wide variety of loot that ranges from resources, all the way up to the incredibly rare Fimbul BYOS Tankship.

See you all in Galia on April 26!
